title: Syrnyk with Fig Compote
description: A traditional Ukrainian dessert featuring a creamy cheese filling and a sweet fig compote.
instructions: In a saucepan, combine heavy cream, sugar, and butter. Heat over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
Bring mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
Remove from heat and stir in cornstarch mixture. Let cool slightly.
Crumble Syrnyk cheese into a bowl and mix in lemon juice.
Add cooled cream mixture to cheese mixture and mix until smooth.
Spoon creamy mixture into individual serving cups or ramekins.
In a separate saucepan, combine figs and 2 tbsp sugar. Cook over low heat, stirring occasionally.
Cook figs for 10-12 minutes, or until they're tender and caramelized.
Serve fig compote over creamy cheese mixture.
